Petition By Pretermitted Spouse For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution And For Distribution From Trust Estate
Off Calendar Feb-21-2017 Off Calendar

Petition By Pretermitted Spouse For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution And For Distribution From Trust Estate
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Continued To Feb-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Ritzinger for (petitioner) Barbara Hall-Spruell. Scott Bassin for and with Michael Spruell.

The Court asked counsel if they are amenable to mediation and both agreed and confirmed that this case qualifies for Pro Bono Mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 3, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 8, 2017. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on February 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Paul Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
